calendar.matters:
PETITION Verified Petition For Order Confirming Personal Property To Petitioner, Decedent'S Wife
Off Calendar Feb-23-2023 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Wald appeared by zoom for and with Brittany Fohrman (petitioner) by zoom.
Bill Price (decedent's father) also on zoom.
Milinda Taylor (decedent's sister) also on zoom.

The court stated that it reviewed the papers. Mrs. Wald stated that there are no objections to the petition and confirmed that the decedent sent a message to Brittney to use the frozen sperm to conceive a child. The Petition for Order Confirming Personal Property to Petitioner is under submission with the court's intent to grant the petition. The court authorizes Spring Fertility to release the sperm to Brittany Fohrman, but will not confirm Brittany as the personal representative of the decedent's estate, as there will be no need for probate administration.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: Choi. Not reported.
